prompt: Create a vertical fantasy xianxia watercolor illustration in a soft pastel palette, with even, unbroken color blending and smooth flowing linework. Center one ethereal celestial maiden, immortal fairy, standing front-facing in an enormous translucent Hanfu gown of pale pink, powder blue, ivory, and gold; the gown spreads outward like clouds and flower petals, covered with tiny glowing ornaments, butterflies, blossoms, and star-like sparkles. She has very long dark hair, an ornate gold floral crown, delicate jewelry, and a calm divine expression. Directly below her, place one small white cat sitting in a bright rectangular doorway of light. Behind her, place one huge pale blue-and-pink moon or luminous circular portal, partly hidden by mist and architectural silhouettes. Surround the scene with floating Chinese immortal-palace scenery: layered misty mountains, distant pagodas, suspended pavilions, hanging bead chains, cloud bridges, and delicate floral branches. Include exactly two vertical Chinese calligraphy inscription panels: one narrow pale panel on the upper left filled with small black calligraphy, and one framed scroll on the upper right with the large title 仙宠 and smaller vertical calligraphy beneath it. Include exactly one arched stone bridge in the lower left-middle distance, exactly three prominent lanterns in the lower half (two warm standing lanterns on the left and one larger ornate hanging lantern near the lower center), and exactly one central luminous portal behind the cat. The atmosphere should feel dreamlike, romantic, ancient Chinese, and magical, with pearlescent mist, glittering light particles, soft ink-wash textures, delicate gold highlights, and a high level of ornamental detail. Use a tall 9:16 composition, airy negative space near the edges, no modern objects, no watermark, no harsh outlines, and avoid fragmented colors or jagged lines.
